title: AUD/USD H2 2026 Outlook
content: Draft analysis of AUD/USD trajectory for the second half of 2026. Key themes include RBA policy path, China demand outlook, and commodity price trends. Initial thesis favors further AUD weakness toward 0.6400.
author: Emily Carter

title: AUD/CNH PBOC Intervention Risk Assessment
content: Analysis of PBOC intervention thresholds and historical patterns affecting AUD/CNH. Examining daily fix signals and actual intervention likelihood as AUD/CNH approaches the 4.80 level.
author: Kenji Tanaka
reviewerNotes: Add quantitative analysis of past PBOC intervention impact on AUD/CNH for context

title: AUD Resilience in Risk-Off Scenarios
content: Study of AUD performance across all three crosses during recent risk-off episodes. Compares 2024-2026 drawdowns in AUD/USD, AUD/CNH, and AUD/GBP with historical patterns.
author: Liam O'Brien
reviewerNotes: Consider adding a carry-adjusted returns table for each pair

title: AUD Options Skew as a Leading Indicator
content: Research into predictive power of risk reversal skew for AUD spot moves across USD, CNH, and GBP crosses. Backtest over 2020-2026 period. Preliminary results show 60% directional accuracy at 1-month horizon.
author: Sarah Mitchell
reviewerNotes: Latest backtest figures look good. Add confidence intervals

title: AUD/CNH and the China Energy Transition
content: Long-term thematic piece on how China energy transition may reshape AUD/CNH correlation framework. Includes scenario analysis for 2030 AUD/CNH fair value as iron ore demand evolves.
author: Emily Carter

title: AUD/GBP Relative Value Deep Dive
content: Expanded analysis of AUD/GBP opportunity. Includes detailed fundamental comparison, terms-of-trade analysis between Australia and UK, and RBA-BoE policy divergence framework.
author: Liam O'Brien
reviewerNotes: Strengthen the ToT section with latest commodity and UK services data

title: AUD/CNH Cross-Border Settlement Analysis
content: Technical analysis of how evolving bilateral payment systems and digital yuan pilot may affect AUD/CNH settlement and pricing. Reviews latest PBOC digital yuan cross-border trial data.
author: Kenji Tanaka

title: AUD/GBP Mid-Year Review
content: Comprehensive review of AUD/GBP performance against the backdrop of diverging macro fundamentals. Covers RBA vs BoE policy, commodity dynamics, and relative valuation. Draft for June publication.
author: Emily Carter
